summary: Tested Member Pages Real-time Sync with MongoDB Change Streams - All 16 backend API tests passed, WebSocket connection verified working, Frontend UI tests passed showing page creation appears instantly in list
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ MongoDB Change Streams are active and watching 8 collections: member_pages, page_products, page_menu_items, page_services, page_rentals, page_orders, page_inventory, member_page_subscriptions
✓ WebSocket endpoint at /api/member-pages/ws/{page_id}?token=xxx - verified working with real-time notifications
✓ Page CRUD operations (Create/Read/Update/Delete) all working correctly
✓ Product CRUD on store pages working correctly
✓ Subscription/Follow functionality working (prevents subscribing to own page)
✓ Slug availability check working with alternative suggestions
✓ Page types endpoint returns all 5 types: store, restaurant, services, rental, general
✓ Frontend Pages.jsx correctly loads and displays pages from API
✓ Create Page modal has all expected fields: name, page_type, category, description
seed_data_creation: Test pages created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Member Pages real-time sync fully verified: 1) Backend API tests cover full CRUD lifecycle, 2) WebSocket connection confirmed working - sends 'connected' on join and 'page_updated' on changes, 3) Frontend UI successfully creates pages that appear instantly in My Pages list, 4) MongoDB Change Streams are actively watching all 8 collections

features_verified.page_creation: VERIFIED - POST /api/member-pages/ creates page instantly, returns 40 BL coins reward
features_verified.page_update: VERIFIED - PUT /api/member-pages/{id} updates immediately, broadcasts via WebSocket
features_verified.page_deletion: VERIFIED - DELETE /api/member-pages/{id} removes page and returns 404 on subsequent GET
features_verified.my_pages_list: VERIFIED - GET /api/member-pages/my-pages returns owned and followed pages
features_verified.websocket_connection: VERIFIED - WSS /api/member-pages/ws/{page_id}?token=xxx connects and receives real-time updates
features_verified.websocket_notifications: VERIFIED - 'connected' message on join, 'page_updated' on changes
features_verified.product_crud: VERIFIED - Create/Read/Update/Delete products on store pages
features_verified.subscription_prevention: VERIFIED - Cannot subscribe to own page (returns 400)
features_verified.slug_check: VERIFIED - GET /api/member-pages/check-slug/{slug} returns availability and suggestions
features_verified.page_types: VERIFIED - GET /api/member-pages/types returns all 5 page types and 5 order types
features_verified.frontend_create_modal: VERIFIED - Modal opens, form fills correctly, submission works
features_verified.frontend_page_appears_instantly: VERIFIED - Created page appears immediately in My Pages tab

websocket_test_results.update_notification: Received 'page_updated' message when page was updated via API
websocket_test_results.ping_pong: Working - server responds to ping messages

note: All requested real-time sync features are working correctly. MongoDB Change Streams are broadcasting changes to connected WebSocket clients. The full CRUD cycle with instant UI updates has been verified.
